data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate whether a digital ticket is sent to the client email/app, as specified in the requirement. However, the evidence provided does not include any confirmation of this functionality being implemented or tested. The linked use case mentions the need for a digital ticket, but there is no evidence from prior steps that indicates such a ticket was generated or sent, leading to a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of digital ticket being sent to client email/app.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
